siteDescription: Menéndez Morro — Portfolio of design and photography projects by Martí Menéndez. Branding, UX/UI, web design, and architecture photography.
contactCopy: MENÉNDEZ MORRO™ is a creative space that gathers Design and Photography projects. Officially established in 2023, based in Mallorca, Spain, and collaborator to multiple clients across Europe.
Especially interested in music and culture projects. Focused on Graphic & Web Design and Art Direction.
Web Design & Development by Martí Menéndez.
